title: jasminum ranongense
intro: Jasminum ranongense, also known as Ranong jasmine or Ranong gardenia jasmine, is a flowering plant species within the Jasminum genus, native to Thailand. The plant's flowers and leaves are rich in medicinal properties, particularly in their flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Jasminum ranongense include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Thai medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
